instructions: Copy this file to curated_papers.json before a real manuscript local LLM archive run.
Replace this template with a JSON list of real paper records.
Each real record must include title and at least one provenance field: doi, pmid, pmcid, url, or source_paper_id.
Include abstracts or rights-compatible excerpts only; do not paste copyrighted full paper chunks unless open-access status and provenance are documented.
Do not use mock_literature records as manuscript evidence.
Do not invent citations, DOI, PMID, PMCID, URLs, LLM outputs, PhysiCell outputs, or wet-lab values.

expected_curated_papers_json_shape.title: REPLACE WITH REAL PAPER TITLE
expected_curated_papers_json_shape.abstract: REPLACE WITH REAL ABSTRACT OR RIGHTS-COMPATIBLE EXCERPT
expected_curated_papers_json_shape.source_paper_id: REPLACE WITH REAL SOURCE IDENTIFIER IF DOI/PMID/PMCID/URL IS UNAVAILABLE
expected_curated_papers_json_shape.provenance_notes: REPLACE WITH SOURCE AND ACCESS NOTES
